title: thelypteris subterminalis
intro: Thelypteris subterminalis, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris subterminalis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
